name: Savoiardi (Ladyfingers)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg yolks until thick and lemon colored.
2. Add the almond extract to the yolks.
3. In a separate bowl, beat egg whites until stiff but not dry.
4. Gradually add sugar to the beaten whites, beating until glossy and very stiff.
5. Gently fold the yolk mixture into the white batter.
6. Fold in the sifted dry ingredients.
7. Drop the batter by tablespoons onto an ungreased cookie sheet, forming fingers that are 3 inches long and 1 inch wide.
8. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes, until light brown.
9. Remove from the cookie sheet and cool on a rack.
Makes 3 dozen.
